suite_path_consumption.rationale: Docs-only architecture baseline with no code, schema, fixture, generated type, runtime, persistence, or user-facing behavior change. ADR 0008 contains the research absorption and contract boundary evidence.
suite_path_consumption.consumer_boundary: Review and PR Ready consume ADR 0008, contracts index, AGENTS constraints, GH-80 carrier, minimal static checks, and PR metadata readback.
suite_path_consumption.recheck_condition: Upgrade to real suite, fixtures, schema checks, type checks, API tests, or runtime validation when any implementation, schema, fixture, generated type, runtime, persistence, or cross-repo consumer is added.

integration_evidence.summary: Records accepted/rejected/deferred Core technical defaults, schema/tool boundaries, module boundaries, no-copy constraints, conformance fixture plan, and explicit research locator decisions.
Links ADR 0008 and lists future skeleton entry points for API Server, Core Runtime, Run Record, Schema, conformance, and cross-repo consumption.
Adds concise stack, dependency, test, change-scope, and safety constraints for future agents.
Maps GH-80 as primary Work Item and #79/#84 as covered FR evidence locators without closing issues.
Aligns current status from closed-out GH-77 to GH-80 after local loom build classified the mismatch as shared carrier drift.
Aligns fact_chain.entry_points from closed-out GH-77 to GH-80 after local loom fact-chain classified the mismatch as bootstrap locator drift.
